title: What's New With VISs | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
February 4, 2022 
New PCV VIS and Updated Zoster/Shingles (Recombinant) VISs Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for pneumococcal conjugate vaccine and an updated VIS for recombinant zoster vaccine have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these VISs immediately, but stocks of the previous editions may be used until exhausted.
The new pneumococcal conjugate VIS includes all currently available pneumococcal conjugate vaccines (PCV13, PCV15, and PCV20). This interim VIS replaces the previous PCV13 VIS. 
The updated zoster/shingles (recombinant) VIS reflects recent changes to indications for use of the vaccine. 
2021 
December 17, 2021 
New Dengue VIS Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for dengue vaccine has been posted on December 17, 2021. It may be used starting immediately.
October 15, 2021 
Updated Hepatitis A, Hepatitis B, Rotavirus, and Multi-Pediatric VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for hepatitis A , hepatitis B , and rotavirus vaccines have been posted. An updated version of the " Your Child's First Vaccines " multiple pediatric vaccines VIS is also available now on our website. Providers are encouraged to begin using these updated VISs immediately, but stocks of the previous editions may be used until exhausted.
August 6, 2021 
Updated VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for DTaP (diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis) , Hib ( Hae
